parents.subject: LU-9648 ptlrpc: Add kernel doc style for ptlrpc (23)

commit.subject: LU-19758 lnet: do not leak wq attrs
commit.message:
LU-19758 lnet: do not leak wq attrs

Always kfree wq attrs if they were allocated.

Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I030f1bdc137a62cda92fbd4dd3010e0ab3978d4f
